theme: Working in a Team vs. Alone

sentences.english: Do you prefer working independently or as part of a team?
sentences.korean: 독립적으로 일하는 것과 팀의 일원으로 일하는 것 중 어느 쪽을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: I prefer working as part of a team because I believe collaboration produces better results than working alone.
sentences.korean: 혼자보다 협업이 더 나은 결과를 낸다고 믿기에 팀의 일원으로 일하는 것을 선호해요.

sentences.english: First team members bring different strengths and perspectives to the table.
sentences.korean: 첫째 팀원들이 서로 다른 강점과 관점을 제공해요.

sentences.english: A problem that seems impossible to one person might be easily solved by someone with a different background.
sentences.korean: 한 사람에게 불가능해 보이는 문제가 다른 배경을 가진 사람에게는 쉽게 풀릴 수 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Working in a Team vs. Alone

theme: Working in a Team vs. Alone

sentences.english: Second teamwork keeps me motivated because I don't want to let my teammates down.
sentences.korean: 둘째 팀워크는 동기 부여가 돼요. 팀원들을 실망시키고 싶지 않으니까요.

sentences.english: That sense of accountability pushes me to do my best work.
sentences.korean: 그 책임감이 최선의 작업을 하도록 밀어줘요.

Working in a Team vs. Alone
